lasagna-with-asparagus-leeks-and-morels.name: Lasagna With Asparagus, Leeks, And Morels

ingredients.item: Leeks (white and pale green parts only)

ingredients.prep: rinsed, coarsely chopped, or 5 ounces fresh shiitake mushrooms, stemmed

instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in heavy large skillet over medium heat. Add leeks; cook until wilted, stirring often, about 4 minutes. Transfer to medium bowl. Melt remaining 1 tablespoon butter in same skillet. Add asparagus, mushrooms, and thyme. Sprinkle with salt and pepper; sauté until asparagus is crisp-tender, stirring often, about 4 minutes. Add to bowl with leeks and toss to distribute evenly. Add broth, cream, and bay leaf to same skillet and boil over high heat until slightly thickened, about 6 minutes. Sprinkle flour over and whisk to blend. Boil until sauce thickens, about 1 minute, whisking until smooth. Remove from heat. Stir in nutmeg; discard bay leaf. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Vegetables and sauce can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Coat four 2-cup shallow oval or round baking dishes with nonstick spray. Break off corners of noodles to fit flatly into dishes. Spoon ¼ cup sauce into each dish. Place 1 noodle atop sauce. Scatter ¼ cup vegetable mixture over, spreading in even layer. Drizzle 2 tablespoons sauce over. Sprinkle rounded tablespoonful cheese over each. Repeat layering 2 more times with noodles, vegetables, sauce, and cheese. Drizzle remaining sauce over lasagnas.

Cover each dish tightly with foil. Place on rimmed baking sheet and bake until noodles are tender, about 40 minutes. Uncover and bake until sauce is bubbling and cheese begins to brown, about 6 minutes. Let stand at room temperature 5 minutes before serving.

latticed-apple-and-cranberry-tart.name: Latticed Apple And Cranberry Tart

ingredients.prep: with 4 teaspoons sugar substituted for the salt

ingredients.item: Whipped cream or vanilla ice cream

instructions: Make a double recipe pâte brisée, substituting 4 teaspoons sugar for the salt, and form it into two balls, one slightly larger than the other. Roll out the larger ball ⅛ inch thick on a floured surface, drape the dough over a rolling pin, and fit it into a 10-inch pie tin, pressing it in firmly. Trim off the excess dough, leaving a 1-inch overhang. Chill the shell for at least 30 minutes. Add the excess dough to the remaining ball, and roll it out into a rectangle ¼ inch thick and 12 inches long on a floured surface. With a fluted pastry wheel, cut 10 strips about ¾ inch wide. Put them on a baking sheet and chill them for at least 30 minutes.

In a small bowl, combine ¾ cup raw cranberries, halved, with ⅓ cup superfine granulated sugar, and let the mixture stand for 1 hour. In a saucepan, plump ¼ cup currants in ¼ cup dark rum or brandy. In a large bowl, combine 8 large cooking apples, peeled, cored, and sliced, the cranberries, ⅔ cup granulated sugar, the currants, and any remaining brandy, 1 tablespoon each of lemon juice and grated lemon rind, 1 teaspoon cornstarch, and ½ teaspoon cinnamon. Turn the filling into the chilled shell, mounding it slightly in the center, and moisten the edge of the dough with water.

Arrange the strips in a lattice pattern over the top, twisting each strip corkscrew fashion (if the dough is very cold, let it soften a bit before twisting it). Press the ends of the stripes to attach them to the pastry shell, trimming off any excess dough, turn up the overhanging dough, and form it into a decorative edge. Moisten the strips with an egg wash made by beating 1 egg with 1 tablespoon milk, and sprinkle them with cinnamon sugar.

Bake the tart in the lower third of a preheated hot oven (218°C) for 20 minutes. Reduce the heat to moderate (177°C) and bake the tart for 40 minutes more, or until it is browned and the juices bubble. Brush the fruit between the lattice with melted apricot jam, and let the tart cool on a rack. Serve the tart with sweetened lightly whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.

learn-how-to-make-a-juicy-grilled-beef-s.name: Learn How To Make A Juicy Grilled Beef Steak
learn-how-to-make-a-juicy-grilled-beef-s.original_name: Aprende a hacer un jugoso filete de res a la parrilla

ingredients.item: 1/3 taza  de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)

instructions: In a large bowl mix soya sauce, olive oil, brown sugar, chopped garlic teeth, paprika, thyme and Dijon mustard.
Mix well and reserve the blend cup for the frying and in the remaining blend submerge the steak to leave marinating for 20 minutes in the refrigerator.

Warm up the grill or grill where you go and cook the steak. Take the steak from the marinade and put it onto the stewer. Roast till the bottom carbonates, about 10 minutes and then turn the steak around, add salt and let it cook about 8 to 10 minutes to be midway. The time depends on the term of cooking as you care about meat.

Meanwhile, prepare the frying in a small pot with medium high heat. Fold the previously reserved marinade and remove without stop till it has been slightly weighed. Then add the butter and remove again until melting. Pull back from the fire.
Cut the steak into slices and rinse with the frying. To decorate with parsley and enjoy with roasted vegetables.

learn-how-to-make-this-and-delicious-gou.name: Learn How To Make This And Delicious Gourmet Salad
learn-how-to-make-this-and-delicious-gou.original_name: Aprende a hacer esta ensalada gourmet fácil y deliciosa
instructions: Uncover the ruula and lasers at the tap.
In a bowl with abundant water, put the ruula stalks and leave to moist with two tablespoons of vinegar to disinfect.

In a bowl put the ruula washed and dried.

Espolvorea con el queso parmesano.
Enjoy this salad and if you want more cheese don't hesitate to add it.

lemon-herb-butter.name: Lemon Herb Butter

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mash butter in a bowl until smooth and creamy.
Mix lemon zest, lemon juice, rosemary, thyme, sage, salt, and black pepper into butter until thoroughly combined.

lemon-hibiscus-frozen-custard.name: Lemon-hibiscus Frozen Custard

ingredients.item: Dried hibiscus flowers or hibiscus tea

instructions: Steep hibiscus in ½ cup very hot water in a small bowl for 10 minutes. Strain into another small bowl, pressing on solids to extract all liquid; let cool.
Meanwhile, bring cream, lemon zest, and ½ cup sugar to a bare simmer in a medium saucepan. Remove from heat, cover, and let stand 10 minutes.

Whisk salt and remaining 2 Tbsp. sugar into egg yolks in a medium bowl to blend. Return cream mixture to a simmer, then slowly pour into egg mixture, whisking constantly until incorporated. Return to saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon and scraping bottom of pan, until thick enough to coat spoon, 5–7 minutes.

Strain into a large bowl (preferably metal; custard will cool down more quickly) set over a bowl of ice water. Let cool, stirring occasionally. Stir in lemon juice and hibiscus infusion. Process custard in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer’s instructions. Freeze in an airtight container until firm, at least 4 hours.
DO AHEAD: Frozen custard can be made 2 weeks ahead. Keep frozen.

lemon-roasted-broccoli-and-asparagus.name: Lemon-roasted Broccoli And Asparagus
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Place broccoli florets in a bowl. Add 1 1/2 teaspoons olive oil oil and 1/2 teaspoon of lemon pepper seasoning. Toss to coat and arrange in a single layer on a baking sheet. Place 1/2 of the lemon slices over the top of the broccoli.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile place asparagus in the bowl. Add remaining 1 1/2 teaspoons of olive oil and 1/2 teaspoon of lemon pepper. Toss to coat.

Add asparagus to the baking sheet in a single layer and place remaining lemon slices over the top of the asparagus. Cook for 10 minutes. Remove baking sheet from the oven and toss broccoli and asparagus together. Serve immediately.

lentil-and-lemongrass-salad-recipe-comed.name: Lentil And Lemongrass Salad Recipe
lentil-and-lemongrass-salad-recipe-comed.original_name: Receta de ensalada de lentejas y lemongrass
instructions: En una cacerola agrega tres tazas de agua, un manojo de lemongrass y lentejas rojas. Ponla sobre la estufa a fuego medio alto y cuece por 10 minutos.
Escurre las lentejas.
For the salsa add two Thai chilies cut into juwith, half a tit garlic tooth, half a tablespoon of brown sugar, half a tablespoon of ginger powder, a lime juice and 1 / 4 cup of fish sauce.
Reveal and add the dressing to the lentils.
Serve with tomato with cubes and onion with julian.

lentil-salad-with-quinoa-argiro.name: Lentil Salad With Quinoa

ingredients.item: 150 gravel or talagan cheese cut into small frames
150 gravel or talagan cheese cut into small frames

instructions: Initially, boil the lentils in a small pot with salted water for about 25 minutes, until they soften but without melting.
Drain them and rinse them with plenty of cold water. Let them drain well and transfer to a large saladpot.
Place the quinoa in a fine colander and rinse thoroughly under running water until the water comes out completely transparent.
Pour the quinoa into a pot, add water to cover it and simmer for about 10 minutes, until the fruit bursts and opens without melting. Salt during the boil.
Drain the quinoa well and add it to the salad bowl with the lentils.
Add all the other ingredients, salt and pepper, add olive oil and vinegar, as well as fresh herbs and halumi.
Gently mix the salad until all ingredients are combined.

lentil-sausage-soup.name: Lentil-sausage Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large stockpot over medium heat. Add sausages; cook until begin to brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer sausages to a paper-towel-lined plate; leave browned bits and drippings in the pot.
Add carrots, celery, and onion to the pot; cook until onion is soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add garlic; cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add lentils and tomatoes; stir to combine.
Add chicken stock, bay leaves, and sausages; bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium, cover the pot, and simmer for 25 minutes. Season soup with salt and black pepper.

light-and-airy-cheesecake.name: Light And Airy Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Wrap outside of an 8-inch springform pan with aluminum foil, then coat inside with cooking spray.
Spread vanilla wafer crumbs over bottom and up sides of the prepared pan, pressing firmly to adhere.
Beat egg yolks and sugar together in a large bowl. Stir in cream cheese, sour cream, and vanilla extract until smooth; set aside.

Beat egg whites in a separate large glass or metal bowl with an electric mixer until foamy. Add cream of tartar; continue beating until stiff peaks form. Lift your beater or whisk straight up; egg whites should form a sharp peak that holds their shape.

Fold 1/3 egg whites into cream cheese mixture using a rubber spatula or wire whisk. Gently run spatula through center, then around edges of mixture lifting the bottom up and over the center, repeating until fully incorporated. Add the remaining egg whites, folding just until blended. Transfer batter to the prepared pan.

Line a roasting pan with a damp kitchen towel. Place springform pan on towel inside roasting pan; place roasting pan on oven rack. Fill roasting pan with boiling water until reaches halfway up sides of the springform pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until edges nicely puffed and surface is firm except for a small spot in center that jiggles when gently shaken, about 50 minutes. Turn off oven; leave cheesecake in the oven for 1 hour. Cool cheesecake in the refrigerator 4 hours to overnight.

lime-and-tequila-infused-strawberries.name: Lime And Tequila-infused Strawberries
instructions: Mix together triple sec, sugar, lime juice, tequila, and lime zest in a medium bowl; stir to dissolve sugar. Pour over strawberries in a large bowl. Let stand, stirring occasionally, until juice forms, about 1 hour.

linguine-with-anchovies-and-tuna.name: Linguine With Anchovies And Tuna

ingredients.item: Slice stale sourdough or country-style bread
Linguine or other long strand pasta

instructions: Heat 4 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet or pot over medium. Cook anchovies and sliced garlic, stirring occasionally, until anchovies are mostly dissolved and garlic is soft (do not let it brown), 6–8 minutes. Add red pepper flakes and paprika and cook, stirring, just until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add tomatoes, crushing with your hands as you go. Break up with a wooden spoon until no large pieces remain; bring to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced to a very thick sauce, 20–25 minutes. Add a splash of water to loosen; reduce heat to low and keep warm.

Meanwhile, blanch kale in a large pot of boiling salted water just until bright green, about 10 seconds. Transfer with a slotted spoon or tongs to a bowl of ice water; let cool. Drain and squeeze kale with your hands to remove excess water; coarsely chop. Reserve pot with kale cooking liquid for cooking pasta.

Pulse bread in a food processor until fine crumbs form. Toss breadcrumbs with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet. Season with salt and gently toast over medium heat, tossing often, until golden brown and crunchy, 6–8 minutes. Finely grate remaining garlic clove over crumbs and stir to coat. Transfer to a small bowl and mix in parsley.

Bring kale cooking liquid to a boil and cook pasta, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Using tongs, transfer to skillet with sauce and add kale and tuna. Toss to combine, adding water a few tablespoonfuls at a time to loosen as needed, until pasta is well coated. Serve pasta topped with breadcrumbs.

little-gem-feta-and-cumin-salad.name: Little Gem, Feta, And Cumin Salad

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Little gem lettuce or hearts of romaine

instructions: Purée 1 3/4 cups feta, yogurt, ground cumin, lemon zest, and garlic in a food processor until smooth. Transfer to a medium bowl. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Toast cumin seeds in a small skillet over medium heat, stirring until seeds are aromatic and slightly darker in color, 3-4 minutes. Let cool; set aside.
Toss lettuce in a large bowl with enough dressing to coat. Season salad with salt and pepper. Garnish with cumin seeds, oregano, and remaining 1/2 cup feta.

lumberjack.name: Lumberjack
instructions: Using a small knife, trim edges of 1 wide strip orange zest to tidy, then wrap around a chopstick and let sit 2 minutes (this will help it hold its shape). Make a hole on each end of orange twist with knife. Wrap around 1 sprig rosemary, securing each end to sprig by threading rosemary through holes in twist. Holding larger end of rosemary sprig, pass over the flame of a gas stovetop burner until orange and rosemary are lightly charred and just starting to smoke. (Alternatively, you can heat broiler and char sprig with twist on a baking sheet on the top rack.)

Pour 2 oz. apple cider, 1½ oz. Amaro Nonino, and 1 dash orange bitters into a glass filled with ice, then top off with 2 oz. club soda. Stir with rosemary sprig with orange twist to combine, then set sprig on top of glass to garnish.

lunchbox-ginger-cookies.name: Lunchbox Ginger Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly coat 3 cookie sheets with cooking spray. Place white sugar in a small, shallow bowl.
Combine brown sugar, canola oil, molasses, and egg in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until blended.

Stir together flour, baking soda, ground ginger, grated ginger, cloves, salt, and cayenne pepper in a second bowl. Add flour mixture to the molasses-egg mixture. Blend well; dough will be quite thick. Dough may be refrigerated or shaped at this time.
Roll dough into 1-inch balls and roll lightly in white sugar. Place 2 inches apart onto prepared cookie sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven, 1 sheet at a time, for exactly 9 minutes. Cookies will still be soft, but will become crispy on the outside and chewy on the inside as they cool.
